raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to buhs tew no ta
Wehrfena Affini nemt / un ar ta-
wu Pirktu us ta Altara Rag-
geem likt / un wiffu zittu Affini
buhs tew isgahst us ta Altara
Grihdi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tew buhs wiffus Tau-
kus nemt/ kas tahs Eekchas ap-
klahj/ un tohs Tawkus pahr to
Akui/ un tahs diwi Jhkstis ar
teem Tankeem / kas tur klahtu
irr/ un tew buhs to eededsinaht
us to Altari.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ta Wehrfena Galtn
Gr: un winna Ahdu / un winna
Suhdus buhs tew ar Ugguni
21. fadedsinaht / ahran ta Lehgera /
tas irr weens * Grehku-Uppurs.
* Eebr: Wall: Tas irr Grehks. 2. Kor: 5, 21
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to buhs tew to wee-
n Annu nemt / un Aaronam
un winna Dehfeim buhs fawnas
Rohkas us ta Auna Galwu likt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tew buhs to Aunu
nokant/ un winna Affini nemt /
un wifsapkabrt to Altari Hazziht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to Auni buhs tew
fawds Gabbalds dalliht / un
winna Eekchas / un winna Rah-
jas masgaht/ un us winna Gab-
balcem un us winna Galwu likt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta buhs tew to wiffu
Annu eededsinaht us to Altari/
tas irr weens Dedsains-Uppurs
tam KUNGAM par weenn fal-
du Simarschu/ tas irr weenslig-
guns tam KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to buhs tew to oh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew buhs te
nokant / un no winna
nemt / un us Aaronas
Ausß-Skripstiau/ un us
Dehlu labbas Aufß-Skr
ta patt us winna Dehlu
Rohkas Jhkschki / un us
labbas Kahjas Jhkschki
to Affini buhs tew us t
wifsapkabrt flazziht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs tew no
na nemt/ kas us to Al-
un uo tahs Swaidifchar
jes / un us Aaronu un
Drehbehm flazziht/ un u
Dehleem/ un us winna
Drehbehm ar winnu / ka
twehtihts effus/ un winna
bes/ un winna Dehli/ un
Dehlu Drehbes ar winna
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew buhs no te
nemt tohs Tawkus/ un t
un tohs Tawkus/ kas ta
schas apklaht/ un ta Af-
kus / un abbejas Jhkstis
Tankeem/ kas pee tahm
to labbu Plezzu/ jo tas ir
Pildischanas Auns.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un weenu Kuimro-
ses/ un weenu Karraschu
fajauktas Maises / un
Rauschu no to nerandset
Kurwja / kam buhs pre
KUNGA Watga buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew buhs te
likt us Aaron Plaukste-
us winna Dehlu Plauksi
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
